{{Infobox location
| name = Cradle
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

''See also: [[Cradle Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Cradle, also known as [[Iteration 110]], is a massive world located in [[Sector Eleven]]. It serves as the birthplace of the [[Abidan]] organization, including its first-generation [[Court of Seven]], and is considered a core world that the [[Abidan]] will protect even during total system collapses. The world consists of a central planet with a population exceeding six hundred billion souls, as well as a moon and various celestial bodies. It is characterized by its [[vital aura]] and a stable connection to the [[Way]], which makes it an ideal environment for recruiting [[Abidan]] candidates; in fact, it produces more recruits per century than any other iteration. The inhabitants of Cradle practice [[sacred arts]], which often focus on combat due to intense competition for resources. The presence of [[Monarchs]] on the world is linked to the existence of the [[Dreadgods]], and it is suggested that the removal of [[Monarchs]] is necessary for the [[Dreadgods]] to perish. While Cradle is one of the most secure worlds under [[Abidan]] oversight, it remains vulnerable to corruption and instability. The world is also the home of [[Ozriel]], who has left behind a beacon to invite talented individuals to join him.}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Cradle]] is the birthplace of the [[Abidan]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c6">''Unsouled'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Cradle]] is the name [[Suriel]]'s organization uses for the world.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c11">''Unsouled'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Suriel]]'s organization considers [[Cradle]] to be where they keep infants.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Cradle]] is an important world.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20">''Unsouled'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Suriel]] requested information on Wei Shi [[Lindon]] from [[Cradle]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21">''Blackflame'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Suriel]] cannot sense [[Cradle]] from [[Oversight]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2">''Skysworn'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Cradle]] is an [[Iteration]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Cradle]] is the central planet of the world and is [[Iteration 110]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c18">''Skysworn'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Makiel]] has influence on the [[fate]] of [[Cradle]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c18" />}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Northstrider]] can be carried back into [[Cradle]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19">''Ghostwater'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Dread War]] was the greatest slaughter of [[Monarchs]] since the creation of [[Cradle]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15">''Uncrowned'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Letting the arrow sit in [[Cradle]] is considered a disruption of balance.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28">''Wintersteel'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Cradle]] is a location where [[Monarchs]] can cause problems.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c2">''Bloodline'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Cradle]] may experience minor corruption due to battles outside its world.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18">''Bloodline'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Cradle]] is considered one of the core worlds by [[Suriel]]'s organization.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18" />}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Cradle serves as the homeworld of [[Ozriel]] and is a planet under his direct protection. Although it shines like a star, the [[Iteration]] remains obscured by the influence of [[Vroshir]]. While [[Ozmanthus Arelius]] traveled to the world to finish certain work, [[the Mad King]] had previously intended to destroy it. Despite its status, [[Suriel]] notes that Cradle remains in danger, and [[Lindon]] finds himself unable to unmake stars while he is stuck there.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Ozmanthus Arelius]] has work to finish in [[Cradle]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c1">''Reaper'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Cradle]] is an [[Iteration]] that shines like a star but is obscured by [[Vroshir]] influence.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c15">''Reaper'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[The Mad King]] intended to destroy [[Cradle]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c22">''Reaper'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Cradle]] is [[Ozriel]]'s homeworld.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25">''Reaper'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Cradle]] is a planet protected by [[Ozriel]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26">''Reaper'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Suriel]] states that [[Cradle]] is still in danger.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c27">''Reaper'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] cannot unmake stars while stuck in [[Cradle]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c27" />}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Ozriel]] raised children in [[Cradle]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c1">''Dreadgod'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Cradle]] is a location mentioned in comparison to the current world's situation.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10">''Dreadgod'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Cradle]] is a place where [[Monarchs]] and [[Dreadgods]] exist.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c11">''Dreadgod'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Some [[Akura clan]] members are in the heavens, while others remain in [[Cradle]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c12">''Dreadgod'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The world of Cradle is a realm that can be visited, though its history and protection were once arranged by two [[Judges]]. While [[Reigan Shen]] sought to remove the [[Dreadgods]] from the world, [[Li Markuth]] once harbored ambitions of ruling the realm like a king, and [[Akura Malice]] demonstrated a willingness to burn everything to the ground rather than surrender. As [[Dross]] discussed the presence of [[Monarchs]] on the world, [[Yerin]] and her companions became the final group to ascend from the realm. Ultimately, [[Lindon]] felt nervous about his departure because Cradle no longer maintained a stable enough connection to pull him back, even as [[Larian]] sought to preserve fragments of the world's history.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] wants the [[Dreadgods]] out of [[Cradle]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c4">''Waybound'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Akura Malice]] would burn all of [[Cradle]] to the ground rather than surrender.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c25">''Waybound'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] mentions [[Monarchs]] on [[Cradle]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30">''Waybound'', chapter 30</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] and her group are the last people to ascend from [[Cradle]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c31">''Waybound'', chapter 31</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Cradle]] no longer has a stable enough connection to pull [[Lindon]] out.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c31" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Larian]] wanted to preserve pieces of [[Cradle]]'s history.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c33">''Waybound'', chapter 33</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Li Markuth]] once thought he would rule [[Cradle]] like a king.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35">''Waybound'', chapter 35</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The protection of [[Cradle]] was arranged by two [[Judges]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] was nervous about leaving [[Cradle]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c36">''Waybound'', chapter 36</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Cradle]] is a place that can be visited.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c37">''Waybound'', chapter 37</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|During [[Iteration 110]], the massive world known as Cradle houses a population numbering in the hundreds of billions. [[Lindon]] experiences the distinct sensation of returning to this location, while [[Northstrider]] senses his surroundings much as he once did upon the world. Meanwhile, [[Eithan's Presence]] has recently begun acquiring memories from Cradle. The potential for conflict arises when [[Eithan]] suggests that engaging in a fight against the [[Court of Seven]] would result in the destruction of the world.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Northstrider]] sensed his surroundings as he had on [[Cradle]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c4">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Cradle]] is a huge world with a population in the hundreds of billions.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Eithan's Presence]] has recently gained memories from [[Cradle]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Cradle]] is a location or world.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The report takes place during [[Iteration 110: Cradle]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c13">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon]] felt the sensation of being back in [[Cradle]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Eithan]] suggests that fighting the [[Court of Seven]] would destroy [[Cradle]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c14">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|“You are the last people to ascend from Cradle. Congratulations.”<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c31" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|“I was trying to preserve these unique pieces of Cradle’s history! For you!”<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c33" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Otherworldly locations]]
